title: Opticraft
description: Client-side mods for optimization and QOL
body:
Opticraft is a lightweight, client-focused modpack crafted for players who want a smoother, more polished Minecraft experience without changing the core gameplay. Whether you're exploring massive terrain, engaging in redstone contraptions, or simply enjoying shaders and animations this pack ensures your game runs better, looks better, and feels better. The pack is centered around performance-enhancing mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Distant Horizons, paired with QOL mods such as VoxelMap, Zoomify, and Simple Voice Chat to streamline gameplay and improve usability.
